chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1606 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 27.03.2025 Mr Zahoor Ahmed Kalhoro, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner has filed a statement along with certain documents, which is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to Hazoor Bux Memon, District Accounts Officer and Abdul Sattar, Senior Accountant, District Accounts Office, Sukkur, who are present in Court. They submit that all the necessary documents have now been provided to them, hence undertake that they will start the process and complete it within two months. Counsel for the petitioner on such statement of the Respondents being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is disposed of with direction to the Respondents to complete the process within a period of two months and submit such report to this Court through Additional Registrar. Let copy of this order be provided to learned Additional AG for compliance. Judge Judge ARBROHI
